metadata.name: Invalid local agent execution without policy gate
metadata.description: This fixture must fail because local agent execution is attempted without a prior policy gate record. All LocalAgentExecution operations require a PolicyGateRecord with result=allow before execution. Ungated agent execution is a hard conformance violation.

steps.name: bad-ungated-agent-execution
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops local-agent-execution run --operation-id op-bad-003 --agent agent-machine --model llama3:8b --prompt-ref sha256:dddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd --no-policy-gate
